mapper.select: SELECT i.id as inquiryId, i.user_id as userId, u.name as userName, i.category, i.title, i.content, i.file, i.result, i.status, i.reg_date as regDate, i.process_date as processDate FROM INQUIRY i LEFT JOIN USER u ON (i.user_id = u.id) WHERE i.id = #{inquiryId}
mapper.update: UPDATE INQUIRY SET result = #{result}, status = 'COMPLETE', process_date = NOW() WHERE id = #{inquiryId}
